description: Tall portrait-format graphic with a photo and a dark navy gradient overlay at the bottom. The photograph shows Donald Trump from roughly the knees up, standing in front of a row of American flags in a colonnade area, wearing a navy overcoat over a dark suit, white shirt and red tie, with his right fist raised. At the top, in white serif capitals, is the headline 'DECEMBER CPI REPORT'. Across the lower navy band, large white text reads 'Inflation Remains Low & Stable; Economy Continues to Blow Past Expectations'. Centered at the bottom is the white line-art White House emblem with the 'THE WHITE HOUSE / WASHINGTON' wordmark.
notable_text: DECEMBER CPI REPORT / Inflation Remains Low & Stable; Economy Continues to Blow Past Expectations
